name: Curve
summary: The Curve class is used by SketchUp to unite a series of Edge objects into one conceptual entity. Since SketchUp is a surface modeler, all circles, arcs, and arbitrary curves are really just edges that are bound together in sequence. There is a subclass of Curve called ArcCurve, which is any curve that makes up part of a circle. You can think of ArcCurves as entities that were created with SketchUp's Arc or Circle drawing tools and Curves as entities that were created with the Freehand drawing tool.

methods.name: count_edges
methods.summary: The count_edges method is used to retrieve the number of Edge objects that make up the Curve.
methods.remarks: The count_edges method is used to retrieve the number of Edge objects that make up the Curve.

returns.doc: num_edges - the number of edges in the curve

methods.name: each_edge
methods.summary: The each_edge method is used to iterate through all of the Edge objects in the curve.
methods.remarks: The each_edge method is used to iterate through all of the Edge objects in the curve.

returns.doc: edge - a variable that will hold each Edge object as they are found.

methods.name: edges
methods.summary: The edges method is used to retrieve an array of Edge objects that make up the Curve.
methods.remarks: The edges method is used to retrieve an array of Edge objects that make up the Curve.

returns.doc: edges - an array of Edge objects if successful

methods.name: first_edge
methods.summary: The first_edge method is used to retrieve the first edge of the curve.
methods.remarks: The first_edge method is used to retrieve the first edge of the curve.

returns.doc: edge - the first Edge object in the curve if successful

methods.name: is_polygon?
methods.summary: Returns True if this edge was originally created by the polygon tool, otherwise false.
methods.remarks: Returns True if this edge was originally created by the polygon tool, otherwise false.

returns.doc: True if this edge was originally created by the polygon tool, otherwise false.

methods.name: last_edge
methods.summary: The last_edge method is used to retrieve the last edge of the curve.
methods.remarks: The last_edge method is used to retrieve the last edge of the curve.

returns.doc: edge - the last Edge object in the curve if successful

methods.name: length
methods.summary: The length method retrieves the length of the curve.
methods.remarks: The length method retrieves the length of the curve.

methods.name: move_vertices
methods.summary: The #move_vertices method moves the vertices in the curve to points.
methods.remarks: The #move_vertices method moves the vertices in the curve to points.

methods.name: vertices
methods.summary: The vertices method retrieves a collection of all vertices in a curve.
methods.remarks: The vertices method retrieves a collection of all vertices in a curve.

returns.doc: vertices - a collection of the vertices
